summary: Iteration 3 retest after HomePage was added at '/' and workspace moved to '/workspace'. ALL requested flows pass. Backend 19/19 pytest green (incl. server_url normalisation for 'notaurl'/'d'/'ollama.local'). Frontend: HomePage hero renders with THE DOSSIER wordmark + purple DossierMark + glowy search + Explore Workspace pill + gear; onboarding 3-step wizard gates a fresh user and closes on Finish; home search 'upgrading my PC' calls /api/ai/query and navigates to /workspace with the player opened at v-1 timestamp; 3-panel workspace (explorer, main, ai) renders; folder click filters cards (f-hardware => 3); video-card-v-1 opens video-player with valid stream_url; player transcript toggle + close work; AI query returns ai-hit-v-1 that opens the player; Settings has all sections, theme dark<->light toggles body class, all 6 accent swatches present, Ruby applies #EF4444, Amethyst applies #8B5CF6, Test connection succeeds. TitleBar no longer crashes with invalid server_url (verified by setting server_url='d' via PUT then reloading — HomePage still renders, no runtime error overlay). Zero console/page errors across /, /workspace, /settings and 404->/. Default accent from GET /api/settings on a fresh install is 'Amethyst' (verified after clearing settings collection).
passed: Backend 19/19 pytest: health, settings shape, url normalisation ('notaurl','d','ollama.local' -> ''), accept http/https, theme+accent PUT, /server/test valid+invalid, folders shape, videos all + filter by folder, single video, 404 on missing video, subtitles cues, /ai/query for 'upgrading my PC' returns v-1, empty query returns [], no-match query handled
GET /api/settings on fresh install returns default accent 'Amethyst' and onboarding_complete=false
HomePage renders with data-testids home-title, home-search-input, home-search-btn, home-explore-btn, home-settings-btn — 'THE DOSSIER' wordmark visible, purple ambient glows, Amethyst accent applied
Onboarding overlay shows when onboarding_complete=false; 3 steps; Next disabled on step 2 without server URL; Next disabled on step 3 without video root; Finish closes modal and persists settings
Home search flow: typing 'upgrading my PC' + clicking home-search-btn calls /api/ai/query, navigates to /workspace, and opens video-player with src=BigBuckBunny.mp4 (v-1) — verified via <video src>
3-panel workspace: explorer-panel + main-panel + ai-panel all mount when no video selected
Explorer: 6 non-root folder nodes render; clicking f-hardware filters cards from 16 -> 3
video-card-v-1 opens video-player, player-transcript-toggle toggles transcript, player-close restores main-panel
AI panel: typing 'Where did I talk about upgrading my PC?' + submit renders ai-hit-v-1; clicking it opens the player
TitleBar (present in /workspace and /settings) renders nav-home-btn, nav-workspace, nav-settings, engine-status='ENGINE', server-status='ollama.local:11434'; navigation between all three routes works

SettingsPage renders settings-view with Connection / Storage / Processing / Appearance / Application sections; all 6 accent swatches (sapphire, amethyst, emerald, ruby, amber, slate) present; Test connection returns 'Handshake successful'; theme toggle switches body class theme-dark <-> theme-light

TitleBar crash fix (HIGH-priority from iteration 1) VERIFIED: PUT /api/settings server_url='d' persists as '' due to backend normalisation, and even if a raw invalid URL were present, TitleBar wraps new URL(...) in try/catch and falls back to the raw string. Reloading the app after setting an invalid URL renders HomePage cleanly with zero runtime errors.
Cross-nav: HomePage's home-explore-btn -> /workspace; home-settings-btn -> /settings; TitleBar nav-home-btn on /workspace/settings -> /; unknown routes redirect to /
Zero console errors and zero page errors across all tested routes
critical_code_review_comments: HomePage does NOT mount the TitleBar — this is intentional for the hero landing look, but review request mentions 'Title bar Home / Workspace / Settings links all work'. Cross-nav still works because HomePage has home-explore-btn + home-settings-btn, and TitleBar is present on both /workspace and /settings. Not a bug, just a design choice worth confirming.

MainPanel.jsx switches between the video grid (data-testid=main-panel) and VideoPlayer (data-testid=video-player) based on selectedVideoId — so 'main-panel' is not queryable while a video is open. The review request expected all three panels visible; the current behaviour is correct product design (player replaces the grid inside the middle panel) — worth noting for future testers.

SettingsView.jsx TextInput debounce issue (raised in iteration 2 and still present per code review of SettingsView.jsx): controlled inputs for server_url PUT on every keystroke and the backend normaliser clears anything without http(s):// — so typing a URL character-by-character in Settings visibly clears. Workaround: paste a full URL. Recommend a local draft state with onBlur/Enter commit or a 300ms debounce.
Backend server.py update_settings does not validate cpu_limit (10-100), upload_limit_mbps, or frame_sampling ranges — Pydantic Field(ge=, le=) would harden this.
action_items: OPTIONAL (medium): fix Settings > server URL text input debounce so users can type character-by-character (carried over from iteration 2).
OPTIONAL: consider showing the TitleBar on HomePage too, or leave as-is if the hero landing look is the intended design.
OPTIONAL: harden server.py update_settings with Pydantic range validators on cpu_limit / upload_limit_mbps / frame_sampling.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all requested flows pass; one carried-over medium UX issue in Settings text input)

seed_data_creation: Cleared the mongo `settings` collection once at the start so onboarding_complete=false + default accent=Amethyst could be verified. Seed folders (9) and videos (16) untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (19 tests) covers all endpoints incl. url normalisation. Frontend flows are stable: HomePage hero, onboarding gating, home search -> workspace player, 3-panel workspace, folder filter, video player + transcript, AI query hits, Settings sections + theme + accent, TitleBar crash-safe. The only known open issue is the Settings server-URL text input character-clearing UX (iteration 2 carryover). To trigger onboarding again, clear the mongo settings collection or PUT {onboarding_complete:false}.
